subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond the mention of the people of utterance and the Kingdom of Names, befitteth the most holy, most exalted court of the Desired One [3.5s]... ...Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Who art the Aim of all creation! I beseech Thee by the ocean of Thy knowledge and the heaven of Thy Cause to preserve me
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر اهل انشاء و ملکوت اسما ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
